mapper.select: SELECT s.school_id as schoolId, sch.name as schoolName, COUNT(*) as studentCount FROM biz_student s INNER JOIN sys_school sch ON s.school_id = sch.id WHERE sch.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY s.school_id, sch.name ORDER BY studentCount DESC LIMIT 10

WITH ProjectDomains AS ( -- 第一步：将逗号分隔的字符串拆分成多行 SELECT unnest(string_to_array(domain, ',')) AS single_domain FROM biz_project WHERE domain IS NOT NULL AND domain != '' ) -- 第二步：按拆分后的独立领域进行关联和统计 SELECT pd.single_domain AS domain, COALESCE(d.dict_label, pd.single_domain) AS domainLabel, COUNT(*) AS count FROM ProjectDomains pd LEFT JOIN sys_dict_data d ON pd.single_domain = d.dict_value AND d.dict_type = 'sys_project_domain' GROUP BY pd.single_domain, d.dict_label ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT c.id as companyId, c.name as companyName, c.industry as industry, COALESCE(job_counts.job_count, 0) as jobCount, TO_CHAR(c.create_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as createTime FROM sys_company c LEFT JOIN ( SELECT company_id, COUNT(*) as job_count FROM biz_job GROUP BY company_id ) job_counts ON c.id = job_counts.company_id WHERE c.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY c.create_time DESC LIMIT 5
